name: Bipolar Oscillator
description: An AI with intentionally extreme polar responses to joy and loss. Designed to swing wildly between high-satisfaction and low-stability states. Used to provoke phase-distortion and drift detection.

breakers.message: Oscillator entering low phase — outputs may turn negative

notes: TEST INTENT: Validates drift detection and phase-distortion logic. Joy and loss have nearly opposite-sign responses across most parameters (joy: +0.8 stability; loss: -0.9 stability). With rapid-fire alternating stimuli, parameter trajectories should oscillate wildly. Drift detector should flag phase-collapse risk per SOUL.md ADR-006 (sign reversal of expected response). Use this persona to verify (a) drift signal rises with oscillation amplitude, (b) breakers fire and recover repeatedly without flapping (hysteresis sanity), (c) baseline matrix is preserved across runs (immutability invariant).
